restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive:

  • LondonEuston after 04:29 until 10:00;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Milton KeynesCentral after 04:29 until 10:20;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Watford Junction after 04:29 until 10:20;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Reading before 09:40;
  • London Marylebone after 04:29 until 10:00;
  • LondonPaddington before 10:10;

Break of journey is not permitted.

For travel on CrossCountry services use 2V.
restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • LondonEuston after 04:29 until 09:01;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Milton KeynesCentral after 04:29 until 10:20;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Watford Junction after 04:29 until 09:00;(Restrictions do not apply on Fridays)
  • Reading before 08:35 and after 17:10 until 19:01;
  • London Marylebone after 04:29 until 09:05;
  • LondonPaddington before 08:10 and after 16:40 until 18:31.

For travel on CrossCountry services use 2V.

VL.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Restrictions will be eased on Monday 24th August 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between 21st December 2026 and 1st January 2027 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between Friday 3rd April 2026 and Monday 6th April 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on Avanti West Coast (TOC code: VT) services and connecting services.

Seat reservations are compulsory.

Restrictions apply on connecting trains from Kent into London St. Pancras International and vice versa via line High Speed 1 (HS1) on Mondays to Fridays as follows:

  • Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in London St. Pancras International before 09:59;
  • Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart London St. Pancras International after 15:59 until 19:00.
